section.name: Alpha Notice
section.p: ⚠ This plugin is in early-phase development (alpha). APIs, configuration schemas, HST component interfaces, and JCR node types are subject to change without notice between releases. Do not treat any aspect of this plugin as stable until a non-SNAPSHOT version is published to Bloomreach Forge.

section.name: Precedence table
section.p: Resolution order is always env var -> system property -> JCR.

section.name: Channel-level overrides
section.p: Channel-specific secrets remain in env vars; the channel stores only the env-var names.

tr.td: Env var name for the channel's API key.
Env var name for the channel's Pathways auth key.
Env vars for secrets, shared JCR node for structure and safe defaults.
System properties passed to Cargo or the app server startup command.
Inject secrets as env vars and let the plugin resolve them per request.

section.name: Structural settings
section.p: The same global config node also holds non-secret structure and endpoint overrides.

tr.td: Override the Search/Category endpoint for staging or private-cloud routing.
Set a shared default for paging.
Set a shared default sort order.

section.name: Cache and reload
section.p: Base configuration is cached in-process. JCR observation invalidates that cache automatically on a config-node save. Env-var and system-property overrides are re-applied on each provider read, so a process restart is only needed when the environment itself changes.

section.name: Security notes
section.p: Treat JCR-stored secrets as a compatibility fallback only. The preferred deployment model is env vars for apiKey and authKey, with JCR reserved for structure and non-secret identifiers.
